name: Paralytic Spores

topRankStats: Charges at an enemy within 30m dealing 160 damage. This releases spores that affect enemies within 15m, opening them up to Melee Finishers, and slowing them by 50% for 10s.
levelStats: Charges at an enemy within 30m dealing 40 damage. This releases spores that affect enemies within 15m, opening them up to Melee Finishers, and slowing them by 50% for 10s.
